LandingVersion.html.source: Version 0.9/26.03.20.01

LandingWelcomeText1.html.source: This survey, the first of its kind, is designed to collect information directly from the people whose beloved companions suffer from canine laryngeal paralysis.

LandingAboutPrivacyText01.html.source: We only need four pieces of information to verify survey results:

LandingAboutPrivacyOrderedList.html.source:
• Your first name
  • Your companion animal's name
  • The country in which you live
  • Your email address or Facebook account name

LandingPrivacyLink.html.source: Learn more about our Privacy Policy

LandingAboutPrivacyText02.html.source: This information ensures that all the survey respondents are unique and verifiable without making them identifiable outside the context of the survey.

LandingConsentText.html.source: By selecting 'Yes' below, you confirm that you agree to the terms of our Consent Policy.

LandingConsentLink.html.source: Learn more about our Consent Policy

LandingConsent.title.source: Do you want to proceed with the survey in accordance with our Consent Policy?
